title: An ongoing Cold War to reverse engineer NonHuman tech!?
summary: This brief interview excerpt discusses claims of an ongoing Cold War between nations to reverse engineer non-human technology. The discussion covers the geopolitical implications and technological advantages that could be gained from understanding UAP technology.

key_claims.claim: There is an ongoing multi-decade Cold War to reverse engineer non-human technology
Every major country has interest and a stake in reverse engineering non-human technology for technological advantage
There is no good way to hold other nation states accountable if they're doing unethical or illicit activity related to this subject
If Russia or China could replicate what the Tic Tac did, it would be a game-changer
